svg.aria-label: § 7.4.1 4-Way Divergence Cost Anatomy — why 30.6× not 4×, decomposed into binary-search branching, code explosion / I-cache thrash, and reconvergence sync

g.text: Decomposing the 7.6× excess: binary-search branching · I-cache thrash · ITS reconvergence sync
A · NAIVE MODEL vs ACTUAL MEASUREMENT
Where does the 7.6× hidden cost come from?
Note: ptxas does NOT balance the tree —
Unrolled body exceeds L0 capacity by 8×
→ 32 KB body sits in L1-thrash zone
Sum of contributions reconciles to measured 91.03 cyc/iter
Σ ≈ 91 cyc · matches measured 91.03 cyc/iter (30.6× baseline)
